title: Mailchimp vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Drip email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your business needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Drip: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Mailchimp and Drip are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Mailchimp excels as an affordable, beginner-friendly all-in-one tool, while Drip specializes in e-commerce automation with deeper store integration. Your choice depends on your business type, budget, and specific marketing requirements.
choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business with limited budget
You want to start email marketing completely free
You need an all-in-one platform with landing pages and basic automation
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business needing advanced store integration
You want revenue attribution and SMS marketing included
You require sophisticated automation workflows built into your platform

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners and cost-conscious businesses due to its free tier and lower pricing. Drip is better for e-commerce companies that need advanced tracking and revenue attribution features. Drip also has higher customer satisfaction ratings on Trustpilot (3.5 vs 1.5).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Drip?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan for up to 500 subscribers and paid plans starting at $13/month. Drip has no free option and starts at $39/month. However, Drip's pricing includes more e-commerce-specific features built-in, which could represent better value for online retailers.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list exports and integrations with email migration services. Most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists in standard formats. Migration is typically straightforward, though you may need to rebuild automation workflows in your new platform.
